subcodes.first_line: In truth, that honoured one hath endured the utmost of hardships and borne the greatest of tribulations in the divine path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه آنجناب در سبیل الهی منتهای زحمات را کشیده اند و نهایت مشقات را
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
